title: Display Preview Button on Form View in Mobile App (iOS and Android)
excerpt: Can the form “preview” button be added to the form view in the mobile application?  Today we just get a note stating that the view is currently unavailable.  I don’t see a need to be able to edit the form in the mobile a…

posts.author: rickwhaas (Rick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can the form “preview” button be added to the form view in the mobile application? Today we just get a note stating that the view is currently unavailable. I don’t see a need to be able to edit the form in the mobile app but having a preview button which opens the form in the mobile browser would be extremely useful.

IMG_2050.PNG1170×2532 135 KB

posts.author: robgibbs (Rob Gibbs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Something…please! I don’t get the functionality described here: Mobile app - board views – Support (monday.com)

I get what @rickwhaas is showing.
Rob
